questions.question: Which restaurants in Los Angeles Ca are open on weekends?
questions.answer: Restaurants in Los Angeles Ca with weekend hours include: Subway (Sat: 08:00-20:00), Bistro Miyoda & Sushi Ichiriki (Sat: 15:00-22:30), Jamba (Sat: 09:00-19:00), Chick-fil-A (Sat: 06:30-22:00), The Coffee Bean & Tea Leaf (Sat: 06:00-22:00), The Source Cafe (Sat: 07:00-19:00), Hof's Hut (Sat: 07:00-22:00), Good Stuff (Sat: 07:00-15:00) and 2591 more. 2599 total with weekend availability.
